code: {/*CustomScrollProgressBar recibe scrollPercentage y permite un seguimiento visual del calor de desplazamiento.*/}import{ProgressBar}from'react-bootstrap';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const CustomScrollProgressBar=_ref=>{let{scrollPercentage}=_ref;const progressBarClass=scrollPercentage>10?'visible':'hidden';return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"progress-bar-container ".concat(progressBarClass),children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(ProgressBar,{now:scrollPercentage})});};export default CustomScrollProgressBar;
